# MoMicro

> MoMicro is an AI chatbot for ecommerce and Shopify stores. It automates
> customer support, answers shipping/return/order questions instantly, captures
> leads, supports signed-in customers, and lets teams manage AI and human
> replies from one dashboard. Built by MoMicro. Free to get started.

## Core pages
- [Home](https://momicro.com/): What MoMicro does, key benefits, and how it works
- [Pricing](https://momicro.com/pricing): Plans and pricing
- [About MoMicro](https://momicro.com/momicro): The company behind MoMicro
- [Contact](https://momicro.com/contacts): How to reach the team

## Key facts
- Product: MoMicro (AI chatbot for ecommerce / Shopify)
- Company: MoMicro
- Automates up to 80% of customer questions; can cut support costs by up to 70%
- Setup in under 5 minutes
- Multilingual: English, German, Spanish, French, Italian, Russian, Ukrainian
